# Sanitized root-discovery sample tree.
d MOVIE
d MOVIE/Feature Alpha
f MOVIE/Feature Alpha/scene 01.mov
d TV SHOW
d TV SHOW/Season 01
f TV SHOW/Season 01/episode 01.mp4
d TV SHOW_SUB
d TV SHOW_SUB/Season 01/Subtitles
f TV SHOW_SUB/Season 01/Subtitles/episode 01.srt
d SHORTS
f SHORTS/short note.txt
d СЕРИАЛЫ
d СЕРИАЛЫ/Сезон 01
f СЕРИАЛЫ/Сезон 01/серия 01.mxf
f README.txt
